description_long: This is a modern, multi-story house set within a walled property featuring a spacious yard with landscaped green areas and paved walkways. The house has a predominantly white exterior with large blue-tinted windows and several balconies, providing a sleek and contemporary appearance. The property includes a covered carport, a wooden pergola, and a patio area with outdoor seating. The main building is rectangular with clean lines, flat roofs, and a mix of vertical and horizontal window arrangements. The front entrance is marked by a wooden gate and a curved pathway leading to the main door. The overall design emphasizes open outdoor spaces, geometric forms, and a blend of hardscape and softscape elements.
description: A modern, multi-story white house with large blue windows, balconies, and landscaped yard, enclosed by a perimeter wall. Features include a carport, pergola, and spacious outdoor areas.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main entrance, curved walkway, carport, and the house's prominent balconies and large windows.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the length of the house, the pergola, and the arrangement of windows and doors along the facade.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the patio area, outdoor seating, and additional green space, with a clear view of the flat roof sections.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displays the pool area, more green space, and the continuation of the modern window and balcony design.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and vertical strips
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a wooden gate, curved walkway, and a simple, recessed door with minimal overhang and no porch.
